title: Kentucky Kernels
writer: Bert Kalmar, Harry Ruby, Fred Guiol
actors: Bert Wheeler, Robert Woolsey, Mary Carlisle
plot: Two out-of-work magicians help lovelorn Jerry adopt little Spanky. When Jerry makes up and elopes, the duo are stuck with the brat. Then Spanky inherits a fortune, so they all head to Kentucky and get caught between two feuding cl...
